answer_en:
Soleus m.
Origin: Soleal line of tibia, medial border of tibia, head of fibula, and posterior surface of fibula
Insertion: Posterior surface of calcaneus via calcaneal (Achilles) tendon

details: Origin: Soleal line of tibia, medial border of tibia, head of fibula, and posterior surface of fibula
